title: ClosedSatisfiesRecurrence
summary: Proves that the closed coefficient formula satisfies the encoded OR recurrence relations.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Proves that the closed coefficient formula satisfies the encoded OR recurrence relations.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows PolyGJMSoperators/OR/Coefficients/ClosedSatisfiesRecurrence.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The regular closed formula satisfies the OR recurrence as soon as the chosen rational defect coefficients cancel against the regular closed coefficient system. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;κ\colon \mathrm{Type} _,\;\operatorname{DecidableEq} κ,\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;K\colon \operatorname{Finset} κ,\;defectCoeffQ\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N \longrightarrow \operatorname{Fin} 2 \longrightarrow κ \longrightarrow \mathbb{Q},\;hcancel\colon \operatorname{SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ} K (\operatorname{ORCoefficientSystem}.\operatorname{regular} N n w₁ w₂) \operatorname{defectCoeffQ},\quad \operatorname{ORRegularClosedFormula}.\operatorname{SatisfiesRecurrence} n w₁ w₂ K \operatorname{defectCoeffQ}
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularClosedFormula_satisfiesRecurrence_of_defectCancellationQ {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (K : Finset κ) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) (hcancel : SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ K (ORCoefficientSystem.regular N n w₁ w₂) defectCoeffQ) : ORRegularClosedFormula.SatisfiesRecurrence n w₁ w₂ K defectCoeffQ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The regular closed formula supplies Gamma-ratio coefficients satisfying the two local recurrence equations of Lemma 3.1. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\quad (\forall I \colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N, \operatorname{ORRegularAFirstRecurrence} n w₁ w₂ I) \land (\forall I \colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N, \operatorname{ORRegularASecondRecurrence} n w₁ w₂ I)
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularClosedFormula_satisfiesLemma31LocalRecurrences {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : (∀ I : ORIndex N, ORRegularAFirstRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I) ∧ (∀ I : ORIndex N, ORRegularASecondRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I)

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
